# HEARTBEAT

Session cadence: at the end of each meaningful change, log a one-line entry here with the date, the file(s) touched, and the reason. Review the last five entries at the start of every new session to rebuild context quickly. Keep this file short — prune entries older than thirty days into an archive rather than letting it grow without bound.
